name: chain__post_show_me_your_startup_website_and_
method: post: show me your startup website and i'll give you actionable feedback | content: inspirational resourcestransparent startupsindie hackers | comment1: built and shipped a seasonal micro-saas in pub

stages.task: Generate platform-native 'show me your website' posts with hooks that maximize replies (curiosity gap, social proof, specificity)
Post to r/SideProject, r/startups, r/Entrepreneur, r/indiehackers, IndieHackers.com, Twitter
Monitor threads for submitted URLs, extract and store website URLs with poster info
Run Lighthouse + Claude analysis on each URL, generate 3-5 specific actionable improvements per site
Post feedback publicly (builds authority), then DM founders with deepest issues offering paid fix
